pages.raw_text:
IF the Milwaukee railroad permits
the eastern limit of the common
user clause Of its franchise to ex-
tend as far as Madelia street, there
will still be show for subsequent
lines to enter the city over the same
right Of way, by making a proper
adjustment with the Milwaukee.


A majority of the city council has
gone on record for Madelia street,
which is six blocks east of Erie
street, the eastern limit of the com
mon user provision which tche Mil
waukee wanted to grant. and which
was covered by the motion of Coun-
Gilman Lambert.


Madelia street was proposed by
Councilman Funk as substitute
for the Erie street line and APP
proved for the time being by the
city council. The Milwaukee is anx-
ious to limit the common user
to Erie street, which would make it
practically Of no value as a means
of affording other lines a chance to
get into the city.
